_description: TV preset that looks up the real episode title from IMDB and includes it in the filename.
_example_after: Show Name - S03E07 - The Real Episode Title.mkv
_requirement: Requires: pip install cinemagoer  (free, no API key needed)
_fallback: If cinemagoer is not installed or IMDB lookup fails, {episode_name} is silently dropped and the template output is trimmed automatically.

movie_name._comment: Standard movie cleanup - strips quality tags, normalizes separators

tv_name._comment: TV preset with IMDB lookup. Template produces: Show Name - S##E## - Episode Title
tv_name._template_comment: Available variables: {clean_name}, {season}, {episode}, {season_episode} (S##E##), {episode_name} (from IMDB). If {episode_name} is empty the trailing ' - ' is trimmed automatically.
tv_name._normalize_separators_comment: Convert dots/underscores to spaces before quality-tag stripping

imdb_lookup._comment: IMDB episode title lookup via cinemagoer. Install with: pip install cinemagoer
imdb_lookup._enabled_comment: Set to false to disable lookup and fall back to pure filename cleaning

tv_name._patterns_comment: Ordered list of episode-detection regex patterns. First match wins. Named groups 'season' and 'episode' must be present.
tv_name._cutoff_tokens_comment: Everything from the first matching token onward is removed from the show name. The episode S##E## is extracted separately, so stripping quality tags here only affects the show-name portion.
